title: carex duriuscula subsp. duriuscula
intro: Carex duriuscula subsp. duriuscula, also known as the slender tussock sedge, is a perennial plant species belonging to the family Cyperaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial activities. The health benefits associated with Carex duriuscula subsp. duriuscula include its ability to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its potential to support digestive health. Carex duriuscula subsp. duriuscula can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for medicinal use.
